ddls:
CREATE TABLE "websites" (
  "website_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each website */,
  "website_name" TEXT /* Name of the website */,
  "domain" TEXT /* Domain of the website */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the website was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the website was last updated */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the website */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visitors" (
  "visitor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visitor */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the visitor */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the IP address has been resolved to a user */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the visitor (if resolved) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the visitor was first recorded */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used by the visitor */,
  "browser" TEXT /* Browser used by the visitor */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system used by the visitor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visitor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visitors_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was created */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website visited */,
  "visitor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visitor */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "visit_time" TEXT /* Time of the visit */,
  "page_count" INTEGER /* Number of pages visited */,
  "hit_count" INTEGER /* Number of hits (page views) during the visit */,
  "bandwidth" TEXT /* Bandwidth consumed during the visit */,
  "last_visit" TEXT /* Date and time of the last visit */,
  "referer" TEXT /* Referer URL of the visit */,
  "utm_source" TEXT /* UTM source of the visit */,
  "utm_medium" TEXT /* UTM medium of the visit */,
  "utm_campaign" TEXT /* UTM campaign of the visit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_visitor_id FOREIGN KEY ("visitor_id") REFERENCES visitors ("visitor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pages" (
  "page_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each page */,
  "website_id" INTEGER /* ID of the website the page belongs to */,
  "page_name" TEXT /* Name of the page */,
  "page_url" TEXT /* URL of the page */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the page was created */,
  "page_type" TEXT /* Type of the page */,
  "page_template" TEXT /* Template used for the page */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("page_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pages_website_id FOREIGN KEY ("website_id") REFERENCES websites ("website_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "page_visits" (
  "page_visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each page visit */,
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visit */,
  "page_id" INTEGER /* ID of the page visited */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the page visit */,
  "visit_time" TEXT /* Time of the page visit */,
  "hit_count" INTEGER /* Number of hits (page views) for the page during the visit */,
  "time_spent" INTEGER /* Time spent on the page */,
  "bounce" INTEGER /* Flag indicating if the page was a bounce */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("page_visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_page_visits_page_id FOREIGN KEY ("page_id") REFERENCES pages ("page_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_page_visits_visit_id FOREIGN KEY ("visit_id") REFERENCES visits ("visit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bandwidth_usage" (
  "usage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bandwidth usage record */,
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visit */,
  "bandwidth" TEXT /* Bandwidth consumed during the visit */,
  "usage_date" TEXT /* Date of the bandwidth usage */,
  "usage_time" TEXT /* Time of the bandwidth usage */,
  "bandwidth_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the bandwidth usage (e.g., KB, MB, GB) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("usage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bandwidth_usage_visit_id FOREIGN KEY ("visit_id") REFERENCES visits ("visit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission is granted to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_map" (
  "map_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role mapping */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the mapping was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the mapping was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("map_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_map_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_map_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geolocation_data" (
  "geolocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geolocation record */,
  "visitor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visitor */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the visitor */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region of the visitor */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the visitor */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the visitor's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the visitor's location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the geolocation data was recorded */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the visitor's location */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization of the visitor's location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geolocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_geolocation_data_visitor_id FOREIGN KEY ("visitor_id") REFERENCES visitors ("visitor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "visitor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visitor */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of the device */,
  "browser" TEXT /* Browser used on the device */,
  "operating_system" TEXT /* Operating system used on the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_devices_visitor_id FOREIGN KEY ("visitor_id") REFERENCES visitors ("visitor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "utm_parameters" (
  "utm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each UTM parameter record */,
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visit */,
  "utm_source" TEXT /* UTM source of the visit */,
  "utm_medium" TEXT /* UTM medium of the visit */,
  "utm_campaign" TEXT /* UTM campaign of the visit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("utm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_utm_parameters_visit_id FOREIGN KEY ("visit_id") REFERENCES visits ("visit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "referer_data" (
  "referer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each referer record */,
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visit */,
  "referer_url" TEXT /* Referer URL of the visit */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the referer data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("referer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_referer_data_visit_id FOREIGN KEY ("visit_id") REFERENCES visits ("visit_id")
)
